limitations: Neutral selected-mandate weighting is a decomposition baseline, not a client policy allocation.
Actual manager returns are context for later manager implementation review.
Production use requires approved real targets, benchmarks, and return methodology.

methodology_summary.actual_allocation_benchmark_return: Sum of actual manager weights times manager mandate benchmark returns.
methodology_summary.advisor_policy_effect: Actual allocation benchmark return minus global benchmark return.
methodology_summary.global_benchmark_return: Whole-portfolio comparator selected for advisor policy attribution.
methodology_summary.manager_implementation: Calculated only as handoff metadata and excluded from the primary report.
methodology_summary.neutral_selected_mandate_basket_return: Neutral basket of selected manager mandate benchmark returns.
methodology_summary.target_policy_benchmark_return: Sum of target manager weights times manager mandate benchmark returns.
